creator: stephen@FreeBSD.org
text:
You should have a directory called something like /usr/local/lib/octave/packages/control-4.0.0/amd64-portbld-freebsd13.2-api-v58.  The last part of that path might be different on your system.

From that directory, type

nm __control_slicot_functions__.oct | grep tg04bx

The output should be something like this:

000000000003f8e0 T G__sl_tg04bx__
000000000003fa90 T _Z14F__sl_tg04bx__RK17octave_value_listi
0000000000152e8f T tg04bx_

It is the last line that is crucial.
